hero.title: Turn businesses without a website into
hero.subtitle: DevLeadHunter finds local businesses with no website, automatically generates a real demo site for each one, reaches out by email — and deploys their site live the day they pay. You sell, the tool does the rest.

pipeline.title: From research to sale, on autopilot
pipeline.subtitle: One chain, six steps linked automatically. You stay in control at every step — but nothing is done by hand anymore.

step1.title: Find
step1.description: We surface businesses without a website on Google, Pages Jaunes and OpenStreetMap, along with their contact email.

step2.title: Enrich
step2.description: Photos, reviews, opening hours, Google rating, logo: every record is automatically enriched with its public data.

step3.title: Generate the site
step3.description: A real website is generated from an industry template, ready to edit in a CMS — without a single line of code.

step4.title: Publish a demo
step4.description: The site goes live on a personalized demo link, active for 14 days before it's automatically removed.

step5.title: Reach out
step5.description: A cold email campaign kicks off: A/B testing, follow-ups and an anti-spam cadence of one email every 20 minutes.

step6.title: Sell & deploy
step6.description: The prospect pays via Stripe → their site goes to production on their domain and CMS access is handed over.

features.title: Everything an agency does by hand, automated
features.subtitle: Every building block of prospecting, from first contact to going live, in a single tool.

demoSite.heading: A real website generated for every prospect
demoSite.description: No more hand-made mockups. DevLeadHunter fills an industry template with the prospect's real data and publishes a complete website, editable in a CMS. Your prospect sees a site with their name before they even reply.
demoSite.feature1: Polished industry templates — not an "AI-generated" look
demoSite.feature2: Content, photos and colors injected automatically
demoSite.feature3: Editable in a CMS (Storyblok), no developer needed
demoSite.feature4: Dedicated CMS space and access handed over on sale

prospecting.heading: Find the businesses that need you the most
prospecting.description: Pick a trade and a city. The tool scans several directories, keeps only the businesses without a website, grabs their email and enriches every record with its public data.
prospecting.feature1: Multi-source search: Google, Pages Jaunes, OpenStreetMap
prospecting.feature4: Enrichment: photos, reviews, rating, hours, logo

coldEmail.heading: Email campaigns that run on their own
coldEmail.description: Write two variants and the tool sends, tests, follows up and respects anti-spam best practices. Every email contains the prospect's personalized demo link.
coldEmail.feature1: A/B testing to find the message that converts
coldEmail.feature4: Resend, Gmail or your own domain — GDPR unsubscribe included
coldEmail.variantApreview: Hi, I've prepared a website for your business…
coldEmail.variantBpreview: What if your customers could finally find you online?

leadScoring.heading: Know who to call back first
leadScoring.description: DevLeadHunter tracks what your prospects do on their demo and with your emails, computes a hot / warm / cold score and summarizes each one's interest with AI. Follow-ups can even adapt to their behavior.
leadScoring.feature1: Hot / warm / cold score combining demo and emails
leadScoring.feature2: Behavior tracking on the demo site
leadScoring.feature3: AI summary of each prospect's interest
leadScoring.aiSummary: Highly engaged prospect: came back to their demo several times and clicked the quote button. Follow up first today.

sales.heading: From payment to production site in one click
sales.description: Send a Stripe payment link with a preview of the site. Once paid, the site goes to production on the client's domain, the demo is removed and CMS access is transferred — automatically.
sales.feature1: Stripe payment link with a site preview
sales.feature3: CMS access handed over to the client on sale

analytics.title: Analytics dashboard
analytics.description: KPIs, conversion funnel and activity: steer your prospecting at a glance.

credits.title: Credit system
credits.description: Pay as you go, no subscription. Buy credits whenever you need them.

emailAccounts.title: Multiple email accounts
emailAccounts.description: Send from Resend, Gmail or your own domain, switching between addresses.

security.title: Encrypted data
security.description: Your accounts and secrets are encrypted and protected to strict standards.

i18n.title: Multilingual
i18n.description: Interface available in French and English, ready for new markets.

autoUpdate.title: Automatic updates
autoUpdate.description: The desktop app updates itself, with no reinstall required.

platforms.title: Work wherever you want
platforms.subtitle: The same power on the web, on your computer and on your phone. Your data stays in sync through your account.

web.title: Web app
web.description: A complete web application in any browser. Nothing to install, available instantly.

desktop.title: Desktop software
desktop.description: A native Windows and macOS application with automatic updates. Perfect for long prospecting sessions.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: Fully responsive interface: track your prospects and run your campaigns from your phone.

pricing.title: Simple pricing: pay as you go
pricing.subtitle: No subscription, no commitment. Free credits to get started, then you only buy what you need.
pricing.creditsSubtitle: Credits are consumed for your searches and email sends — you only pay for what you use.

search.title: Search & enrichment
search.description: Each search consumes a few credits. The more you explore, the more qualified prospects you find.

email.title: Email sending
email.description: Each email sent consumes credits. Top up anytime, in under a minute.

pricing.roiNote: A single site sold funds thousands of credits.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: In plain terms, what is DevLeadHunter?
faq.a1: It's a complete automation chain: it finds businesses without a website, generates a demo site for them, reaches out by cold email and deploys their site to production when they buy — all from a single tool.
faq.q2: Is the generated site a real, editable website?
faq.a2: Yes. It's not just an image: it's a real, high-performance website connected to a CMS (Storyblok). The client can edit the content, photos and pages themselves, without a developer.
faq.q3: Which platforms can I use it on?
faq.a3: On the web (any browser), as a native Windows and macOS desktop app, and on mobile thanks to a fully responsive interface. Everything stays in sync through your account.
faq.a4: You get free credits on signup. After that, credits are consumed as you go (searches and emails) and never expire. No subscription — top up whenever you like.
faq.q5: Is it GDPR and anti-spam compliant?
faq.a5: Every email includes an unsubscribe link, sends are throttled to one every 20 minutes, and you control your sending domain (Resend, Gmail or your own) to protect your reputation.
faq.q6: Can I try it for free?
faq.a6: Yes. Create an account, get free credits and test the entire pipeline with no credit card.

cta.title: Ready to fill your calendar with clients?
cta.subtitle: Create your account, get free credits and launch your first automated campaign today.
cta.note: No credit card · Free credits on signup

footer.description: The automation chain that turns businesses without a website into clients: research, site generation, cold email and go-live — end to end.
